source_name: Code4rena Nudge.xyz Findings and Analysis Report (2025-03) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
issue_title: Missing rescueTokens function in NudgePointsCampaigns contract
summary: NudgePointsCampaigns lacks a rescueTokens function even though NudgeCampaign has one. Tokens accidentally sent to the points campaign contract may be permanently locked because administrators have no emergency recovery function.
root_cause: inconsistent administrative token-recovery surface between related campaign contracts
why_not_medium_or_high: the issue concerns accidental token transfers and emergency recovery; it does not show a permissionless exploit path or theft from intended protocol flows
operational_risk: mistaken transfers to NudgePointsCampaigns can become unrecoverable, creating support burden and potential user/admin losses from operational mistakes
recommended_mitigation: add an admin-gated rescueTokens function to NudgePointsCampaigns
ensure rescue logic cannot withdraw tokens needed for active campaign accounting
when_it_could_escalate: if users commonly transfer tokens directly to campaign contracts
if valuable reward or target tokens can become stuck outside normal accounting
if there is no alternative recovery process or upgrade path
